title: マイペース・タキオン

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, we're meeting in front of the station
tomorrow at 9:00 a.m. Don't forget.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Were you not listening to me? Or... maybe I never
told you. Either way...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
With the help of an acquaintance, I've been able
to acquire equipment and chemicals for my
experiments at a low cost.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My current experiment is at its most crucial stage,
and I need the materials right away.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, listen. You're going to carry the goods. You
need to be at the station by 9:00 a.m. Do not
forget.

It's 9:00 a.m. the following morning. I'm waiting in
front of the station, but Agnes Tachyon has yet
to arrive. An hour passes, and then another.

Just as I begin to wonder if something bad has
happened, I get a call from her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Behind... the academy... hurry... come...
Thud!

What's going on?! It sounds like she's behind the
school building. I hurriedly make my way back.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hey... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I was conducting an experiment... and then... I
started to lose consciousness...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I was so absorbed in my work that I had forgotten
to eat...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Protein, vitamins, sugar... nutrients...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I'm drifting off again... Trainer, something,
some nutrition... please...
choice_data_list: Wait a sec, hang in there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Uuugh... hurry...

I grab the first thing that catches my eye in the
cafeteria, pile it onto a plate, and bring it back to
Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Phew! That hits the spot. My goodness, that was a
close call.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It was worth the effort to hold out. Thank you for
your timely response, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Still... Haha! What a mountain of food! You must
have been worried sick!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ah... Anyway, you saved me there.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'll make sure to be more careful not to forget to
eat in the future.

Agnes Tachyon pats her tummy and smiles
contently, as if she's learned something new.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hurry... please...

I rush to the school store and buy up a bunch of
easy-to-eat foods to bring to Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Phew! I'm revived!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Geez... See what happens when you let me out of
your sight!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If you're going to be my assistant, you'll need to
be more careful.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! Maybe I should develop an emergency
call button just for you.

Despite her complaining about my absence,
Agnes Tachyon smiles contently, as if she's
learned something new.
